goal: Move the loop-controller implementation behind the transfer_surface namespace while preserving the top-level loop_controller module path through a compatibility alias.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Keep loop-controller behavior unchanged in this tranche
behavioral_changes: The real loop-controller implementation now lives under chip_labs.transfer_surface.
The old top-level loop_controller module now acts as a compatibility alias.
The transfer namespace now exports LoopConfig, LoopTelemetry, LoopResult, and RecursiveLoopController for internal callers.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.loop_controller import RecursiveLoopController, LoopConfig; from chip_labs.transfer_surface.loop_controller import RecursiveLoopController as moved_RecursiveLoopController; from chip_labs.transfer_surface import RecursiveLoopController as api_RecursiveLoopController; import chip_labs.cli; print('loop-controller-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: Phase 7C then shifts from implementation-file moves toward cross-surface dependency cleanup rather than more same-pattern relocations.
Keep the top-level compatibility alias until the transfer surface is fully settled.
